svg.title: Outfit generation algorithm — block diagram v3
svg.desc: Updated block diagram including conflict rules applied in Block D, three skip reason types in Block C, and corrected retry logic for conflict-caused exhaustion.

g.text: For each slot: apply conflict rules
then pick random from filtered pool
Different earlier picks may clear it
Sort all piece IDs into one array

svg.text: retry (blocked or banned) → sessionBan → back to B
H2 reroll / H4 block → back to B
H4: add to blockedList (permanent) + sessionBan → back to B
Separate flows — not part of generation
v3 changes: Block A now loads conflictRules[]. Block D applies conflict rules sequentially as slots are picked.
Conflict exhaustion retries from B (different random picks may clear the rule). H3 is now "Wore This".
3 skip reasons: no-pieces · all-filtered · conflict-rule. I-X = input to block X. O-X = output.
